title: Umami Fold English Muffin Bowl
description: A post-workout Korean-inspired dish featuring nut-free-friendly English muffins folded into a bowl for easy consumption.

ingredients.name: English Muffin
ingredients.notes: Ensure they are nut-free if required.

ingredients.name: Fresh Herbs
ingredients.amount: To taste, fresh parsley and dill

ingredients.name: Butter or Olive Oil for Cooking

instructions: Mix together chickpea flour, water, umami seasoning, and vegetable oil in a bowl.
Stir until the mixture is smooth without any lumps. The consistency should be similar to pancake batter.
Heat butter or olive oil in a small skillet over medium heat.
Once hot, pour the mixed dough into the pan and spread evenly to form two oval-shaped muffins.
Fold each muffin half way down its length while still in the skillet. Let them cook for about 2 minutes per side until golden brown and crispy on the outside.
Carefully transfer folded muffins onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or directly into an oven-safe container to cool.
Top cooked muffins with fresh herbs like parsley and dill, if desired.
